items.titolo: OpenAI Locks Down San Francisco Offices Following Alleged Threat From Activist
items.descrizione: A message on OpenAI’s internal Slack claimed the activist in question had expressed interest in “causing physical harm to OpenAI employees.”

items.titolo: Come usare Copilot per creare podcast in pochi secondi
items.descrizione: Copilot di Microsoft può generare podcast in meno di cinque minuti con un solo prompt, con conduttori virtuali che dialogano in stile radiofonico. The post Come usare Copilot per creare podcast in pochi secondi appeared…

items.titolo: Anthropic signs $30 billion deal with Amazon to deploy Claude on AWS — Nvidia and Microsoft jointly invest $15 billion into AI firm as it becomes first provider across Azure, AWS and Google
items.descrizione: Anthropic, Microsoft, and Nvidia have struck a joint partnership to run the Claude AI on Microsoft's Azure servers using Nvidia hardware. Anthropic will invest $30 billion in the move, as well as a guarantee to provide…
